data.title: Prune unused shadcn/Replit scaffold (ui primitives, dead providers, orphaned deps)

data.body: Context: src/components/ui/ was scaffolded from shadcn/ui (new-york, baseColor neutral) via Replit. App imports only 8 of 59 ui modules; of those, 4 are custom Fractal components (AvatarBadge, FadeIn, FractalPattern, MandelbrotCorners) and the only genuinely-used shadcn-derived piece is button.tsx (a clean FRAC-27 rewrite — cva+Slot shell, custom editorial styling). toast/toaster/tooltip are mounted in App.tsx but inert (zero toast() calls, zero TooltipTrigger/Content). react-query QueryClientProvider is also mounted but unused (zero useQuery/useMutation). Goal: delete all dead scaffold, strip App.tsx to bare router, prune orphaned npm deps, keep build/tests/typecheck green. Neutral tokens (secondary/accent/etc) only existed to feed these — follow-up DESIGN.md doc cleanup is FRAC-198.

Branch frac-200-prune-shadcn-scaffold is based on frac-198-repo-docs (not master) to avoid a Lattice id-counter collision — recreating off master would re-allocate FRAC-198. Code changes here are disjoint from FRAC-198's doc changes; merge after #231 or rebase onto master once it lands.

Cold review (independent sub-agent, fresh context) vs plan acceptance criteria: PASS. Verified: typecheck + build pass; test suite at FRAC-199 baseline exactly (7 fail / 141 pass, same buttons/footer/navigation/neighborhood tests, zero import/provider-related failures); no surviving src/ file imports any deleted module; surviving ui/ closure is exactly the 5 intended files; button.tsx resolves (@radix-ui/react-slot kept); all 42 removed deps have zero surviving imports and no kept dep dropped; lockfile in sync; tests lost no meaningful coverage (only incidental provider wrappers removed). One process finding: original commit was incomplete (git add pathspec 'App.tsx' vs 'src/App.tsx' silently aborted staging) so App.tsx/tests/package.json/pnpm-lock were uncommitted — FIXED by amending; committed tree now self-consistent (no dead refs). Not implementation rework; code was correct.
